items.title_zh: 星动纪元登顶具身奥林匹克，狂揽三项全球冠军
items.summary_zh: 量子位：中国具身智能公司星动纪元在Benjie's Olympics中斩获三项全球第一——两项金牌任务（剥橙子、开锁）、一项银牌任务（翻袜子），击败PI闭源模型。自研VLA具身大模型凭借知识迁移、自适应视觉注意力、异步高频推理三大优势，剥橙子仅需1分47秒（快PI35%）、开锁49秒（快PI25%）。

items.title_zh: 紫荆智康发布“紫荆AI医院”线上虚拟诊室
items.summary_zh: 量子位：清华大学智能产业研究院孵化的紫荆智康公司发布“紫荆AI医院”线上虚拟诊室，面向全球医生和医学生开放。产品包含AI患者智能体（26个临床科室，支持图文对话、自动病历撰写、深度推理与决策建议）和医生分身智能体，支持中英文及互译，未来将支持更多语言。

items.title_zh: 阿里Wan2.7视频生成模型登顶DesignArena榜单
items.summary_zh: 量子位：阿里最新Wan2.7视频生成模型以1334 Elo评分登顶DesignArena视频生成榜单，领先第二名Grok Imagine 68分。Wan2.7-Video系列包含文生视频、图生视频、参考生视频和视频编辑模型，其视频编辑功能允许用户仅通过文本提示修改视频部分或全部。

items.title_en: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw's creator from accessing Claude
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Anthropic暂时禁止OpenClaw创建者访问Claude，该禁令是在上周Claude对OpenClaw用户定价调整后实施的。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw's creator from accessing Claude. This ban took place after Claude's pricing changed for OpenClaw users last week.

items.title_en: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser's delusions and ignored her warnings
items.title_zh: 跟踪受害者起诉OpenAI，指控ChatGPT助长施暴者妄想并无视警告
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：一名跟踪受害者起诉OpenAI，指控公司无视三次警告称ChatGPT用户具有威胁性——包括自家大规模伤亡标志——而该用户跟踪骚扰其前女友。诉讼称AI工具放大了施暴者的妄想。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: A stalking victim has filed suit against OpenAI, alleging the company ignored three warnings that a ChatGPT user was a threat—including its own mass-casualty flag—while he stalked and harassed his ex-girlfriend. The suit claims the AI tool amplified the abuser's delusions.

items.title_en: TechCrunch is heading to Tokyo — and bringing the Startup Battlefield with it
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：TechCrunch将把Startup Battlefield带到东京举办SusHi Tech 2026，聚焦四大技术领域——AI、机器人、韧性、娱乐。活动将包含人形机器人演示、自动驾驶软件会议、网络防御深度解析、气候技术以及AI对全球音乐和动漫行业影响的对话。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: TechCrunch will bring its Startup Battlefield to Tokyo for SusHi Tech 2026, focusing on four tech domains: AI, Robotics, Resilience, and Entertainment. The event will feature humanoid robot demos, sessions on autonomous driving software, cyber defense deep dives, climate tech coverage, and conversations about AI's impact on music and anime.

items.title_zh: 蚂蚁集团AI鉴真技术登顶世界顶会
items.summary_zh: InfoQ：蚂蚁集团AI鉴真技术登顶世界顶会，能够一眼辨出Deepfake，标志着其在AI安全领域的突破性进展。

items.title_zh: Meta发布闭源巨兽，143亿美金重注AI赛道野心
items.summary_zh: InfoQ：Meta在多年开源倡导后转向闭源AI策略，投入143亿美元发展AI。这一转变引发了关于“开源信仰崩塌”的讨论，Meta选择扩大专有AI发展而非为开源AI工具集做出广泛贡献。
items.summary_en: InfoQ: Meta shifts toward a closed-source AI strategy after years of open-source advocacy, with a $14.3 billion investment into AI. This pivot has sparked debate around open-source faith being shaken.

items.title_zh: 谷歌开源多智能体编排测试平台Scion
items.summary_zh: InfoQ：谷歌开源Scion，这是一个实验性多智能体编排和测试平台，旨在简化多智能体AI系统的开发、测试和部署，为协调多个自主智能体提供结构化工作流。

items.title_en: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Academy with comprehensive learning resources
items.title_zh: OpenAI推出ChatGPT Academy综合学习资源
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：OpenAI发布ChatGPT Academy，包含25个学习课程，涵盖自定义GPT、团队协作、数据分析、金融、医疗、负责任AI使用、提示基础以及各行业应用（客服、销售、营销、经理、运营等）。
items.summary_en: OpenAI: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Academy with 25 learning courses covering custom GPTs, team collaboration, data analysis, finance, healthcare, responsible AI use, prompting fundamentals, and industry applications for customer success, sales, marketing, managers, operations, and more.

items.title_en: Cursor 3 is a unified, agent-first workspace for building software
items.title_zh: Cursor 3是统一的、智能体优先的软件开发工作区
items.summary_zh: Cursor：Cursor 3是统一的、智能体优先的工作区，用于构建软件。更新界面简化了与本地和云智能体在多个存储库中的协作，支持并行运行智能体，支持环境和快速切换。包括内置Composer 2访问、集成本LSP支持的文件浏览和用于测试本地网站的内置浏览器。
items.summary_en: Cursor: Cursor 3 is a unified, agent-first workspace for building software. The updated interface streamlines working with local and cloud agents across multiple repositories, lets users run agents in parallel, and enables fast handoffs between environments. It includes built-in access to Composer 2, integrated file browsing with full LSP support, and a built-in browser for testing local websites.

items.title_en: Better MoE model inference with warp decode technique
items.title_zh: 通过warp decode技术改进MoE模型推理
items.summary_zh: Cursor：文章讨论“warp decode”技术，一种在Blackwell GPU上改进小批次MoE混合专家模型推理的方法。标准MoE路径围绕专家组织，适合大批次但对小批次有开销。Warp decode为每个GPU warp分配单个输出神经元，融合投影，消除阶段和缓冲区，实现1.84倍吞吐量增益和1.4倍更准确的输出。
items.summary_en: Cursor: The article discusses warp decode, a technique for improving MoE model inference on Blackwell GPUs for small-batch decode. The standard MoE path organizes around experts, which works for large batches but has overhead for small ones. Warp decode assigns each GPU warp to a single output neuron, fusing projections, eliminating stages and buffers, and achieving 1.84x throughput gain and 1.4x more accurate outputs.
